_comment: OpenAI Chat Completions response shape — note the fundamental differences from the Anthropic shape: choices[] wrapper, message.tool_calls array, function.arguments as a JSON-encoded STRING (not native object), finish_reason 'tool_calls' (vs Anthropic 'tool_use'). The OpenAIProvider in provider_openai.go translates this back into our Anthropic-style internal CreateMessageResponse.

message.content: I'll use the math tool to compute 2 + 3.
